gist.headline: Polli CLI gets a bump
gist.blurb: Just a quick version bump for the Polli CLI to keep the NPM registry happy and unblock our latest updates.
gist.summary: Bumped the polli-cli package version to 0.1.0-alpha.2 to resolve an NPM publishing conflict.
gist.impact: Unblocks the release pipeline for the latest CLI updates.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) stamping a new version number on a cardboard box representing an NPM package.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot stamping a new version number on a small cardboard box. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot stamping a new version number on a small cardboard box. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
